item.title: Towards Multi-dimensional Evaluation of LLM Summarization across Domains and Languages
item.description: <!-- > [!NOTE] > Click the _Cite_ button above to demo the feature to enable visitors to import publication metadata into their reference management software. > [!NOTE] > Create your slides in Markdown - click the _Slides_ button to check out the example.
